title: TipSubmission
description: A tip / report submitted to a Manhattan District Attorney bureau — report suspected financial fraud, elder abuse, human trafficking, a hate crime, public corruption, cybercrime, and so on. NET-NEW: there is NO public tip-intake API today. The site offers only a generic Contact Form 7 form (reCAPTCHA-gated) and published bureau phone lines; FOIL records requests are delegated off-site to NYC OpenRecords. This schema serves both the write surface (submit a tip) and the read-back of a submitted tip's status.

tipId.description: Server-assigned tip / reference number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Intake status. Set by the office, not the submitter.

subject.description: Short subject line for the tip.

description.description: Free-text description of what is being reported.

incidentDate.description: When the reported conduct occurred, if known.

anonymous.description: Submit without contact details. Anonymous tips cannot receive status updates.

attachmentsNote.description: Note describing any documents/evidence the submitter can provide.
